sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93783" key="shlaggeu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σηλαγγεύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">έως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n93783.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gold refiner</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:27" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σάλαγξ</foreign> and <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">σῆραγξ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
